summary: Iteration 58: Brand color wiring fully verified end-to-end. All 12 test requirements pass. Backend: 24/24 tests pass (100%). Frontend: CSS variables set correctly from DB, all hero banners/sidebars/card accents use var(--aa-primary) and var(--aa-accent) CSS variables (no hardcoded colors). Dynamic color change test: changing primary to #dc2626 (red) via admin API instantly reflects on store hero, sidebar, and articles page on next load. hexToHsl conversion working (--primary shadcn = '226 71% 40%' for #1e40af). Admin branding labels all have descriptive text.
critical_code_review_comments: All brand color wiring complete and verified:
2. Store.tsx glows: color-mix(in srgb, var(--aa-accent) 10%, transparent) ✅
7. Articles.tsx card top accent: style={{ backgroundColor: 'var(--aa-primary)' }} ✅
11. WebsiteContext.tsx --primary shadcn variable set on load ✅
12. Admin WebsiteTab.tsx: All 9 color labels have descriptive text ✅
seed_data_creation: Primary color was changed to #dc2626 for dynamic test, then restored to #1e40af. Accent remains #7c3aed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All brand color wiring verified. DB: primary=#1e40af, accent=#7c3aed. CSS vars: --aa-primary, --aa-accent, --primary (shadcn), --primary-foreground all set from WebsiteContext on load. Dynamic update confirmed: changing primary via admin API reflects on next page load. All hero banners, sidebars, card accents use CSS variables. Admin branding labels show descriptive text. No hardcoded colors remain in hero elements.
rca_of_issue: Previous iteration 57 had ProductHero accent dash line still hardcoded (reported as optional). This iteration verifies ALL elements are now using CSS variables - confirmed ProductHero accent line now uses style={{ backgroundColor: 'var(--aa-accent)' }} (found 3 elements in ProductHero all using var(--aa-accent): 2 glow effects with color-mix + 1 dash line). Full color wiring complete.
